title: Lsn
description: lsn.io zoominfo.com/c/lsn/557824732 software development company specializing in tailor-made IT solutions for the insurance industry. Founded in 2008 as Logisfera Nova and rebranded in 2020, the company provides full-stack services including back-office development, UX/UI design, data science, and enterprise software architecture. Headquartered in Gdańsk, Poland, with a branch in Athens, Greece, LSN partners with leading insurance sector clients to deliver agile, business-focused, and customized technological solutions
